fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip:
Displays the number of the archived time sheet to which the comment applies.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Time Sheet Line No.
fields.tooltip: Displays the line number for an archived time sheet to which the comment applies.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Displays the number of times that the No. value has been used in a number series.

Additional Information

This number, in combination with the document number, ensures that you always maintain a unique number for the archived document. This is useful if you have changed the number series and as a result, there is a conflict in numbers.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when a comment was entered for an archived time sheet.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for a comment for an archived time sheet.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies the comment relating to an archived time sheet or time sheet line.
